pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 99 ('New Vehicle Cost,`$58000,Unit Price') and verifier.py line 94 (gt_budget = gt_replace_count * 58000)
setup_task.sh line 48 ('$Age = 2025 - $Year') and setup_task.sh line 100 ('Current Fiscal Year,2025,') and verifier.py line 78 ('current_year = 2025')
setup_task.sh line 98 ('High Cost CPM,$0.12,Cost Per Mile') and verifier.py line 88 ('cond_cost = (row['GT_CPM'] >= 0.12)')

setup_task.sh line 97 ('Replacement Miles,200000,Miles') and verifier.py line 87 ('or (row['Odometer'] >= 200000)')

Mathematically derived from task design: 60 vehicles with ~20% aged 8+ years (12 vehicles guaranteed to trigger REPLACE via age threshold). Additional vehicles may trigger REPLACE via high mileage (>=200k miles) or high CPM (>=0.12). Expected REPLACE count: 10-12 vehicles. Budget = REPLACE_count * $58,000 = $580,000-$696,000. Metadata range [600000, 700000] is consistent with expecting 10-12 replacement vehicles.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves analyzing a fleet of 60 synthetic vehicles across three Excel sheets (Inventory, Maint_Log, Policy). Replacement criteria are: vehicles with age >= 8 years, odometer >= 200,000 miles, or cost-per-mile >= $0.12. New vehicle cost is $58,000. Current reference year is 2025. The synthetic data is generated with vehicles weighted toward 2018-2024 (80%) and 2014-2017 (20%), ensuring approximately 10-12 vehicles trigger replacement status, yielding expected total budget of $600,000-$700,000. All threshold values are consistently implemented across generation and verification code.
